Key Takeaways:
• Let’s now assume you have a partner on board. A lot of people forget about putting
together a sequence to sell your partners on promoting your product and doing it
very well
• It’s a whole different level when they go all out for your launch - mailing just once
doesn’t do nearly as much. This sequence uses a lot of the mental triggers I’ve
already taught you
• Because of the support from my partners I’ve now done 10 or 11 consecutive JV
Launches and they’ve all done multi-millions of dollars
• My top partners might mail 8-10 times during the pre-launch and launch
• This is not because they’re my friends, but because they make money, they align
themselves with me, and they might get me to promote for them
• The sequence for why they should mail is very important - that’s the big promise
of the prelaunch. You want your partners to mail every piece of prelaunch content:
PLC 1, 2, and 3
• You also want them to mail when you Open Cart to your sales video. You want
them to mail when you Close Cart - I like them to mail 3 times there
• Each time they’re mailing your squeeze page your list is growing.
• Your software will cookie the prospect and track them to appropriately pay
commissions. However, JV Launches are inherently messier than Internal
Launches
• Sometimes a partner will jump in during your pre-launch and want to mail at a
random time. With a JV Launch you can’t assume that your partners will mail for
each piece
• Your goal should be to make money for your JV partners. Don’t test on them, take
care of them, and treat their list like gold
• Key Point: If your launch doesn’t convert well, other JV’s will talk and they
won’t mail for you next time

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Now, let's say you've got a partner on board, or maybe you've got more than one
partner on board.
One really important thing (and this is something that people don't
see that happens behind the scenes) is the importance of you putting
together a sequence for your partners.
In other words, this isn't a sequence to sell your product. This is a sequence to sell
your partners on promoting your product and promoting it really hard. It's one
thing for them to mail, to send out one email for your product for you prelaunch, sending
people to you first piece of Prelaunch Content. It's another thing for them to go all out for
your launch and that's why you want to put together this sequence.
This sequence is going to use many of the triggers that I have already taught you
in PLF, generally the sequence is almost always done via email. There are some times
that you might create a video for your partners, maybe even two videos for your partners
but it is not like a prelaunch sequence for them in terms of the opportunity video and
that type of thing, but it is a lot of the same mental triggers. It's a lot of the same
psychology. You've already learned what you need.
Like I said, it's one thing to get them to mail once, and it's another thing to get
them to mail over and over. My top partners, in our business we do this better than
anyone. We have great support in our JV Launches and our launches absolutely crush it.
I have done something like 10 or 11 consecutive seven-figure Joint Venture Launches for
my products and if you add in the launches where I have managed for others people,
you're probably up in the 13 or 14 consecutive launches that have done either millions,
either seven figures or multiple seven figures, multimillions, so I know this. In my
launches, my top partners typically might mail eight times or even 10 times throughout
the prelaunch and the launch.
I'm going to actually walk you through my sequence, the sequence I use to get
people excited to mail for me and to keep them mailing. Of course, the partners that mail
8 or 10 times during my launch, they are not doing it out of the goodness of their hearts;
they are doing it because they're going to make a lot of money. You make tons of
commissions. My products convert. They make tons of commissions. They help a lot of
products. They align themselves with me and my brand, which is I think the most
powerful brand in my market and they might even get me promoting for them. That's
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

4
© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
why they will promote but you have to put together this sequence to get them excited to
communicate why they should mail.
Those reasons I just gave you, the reasons why people mail for me, those are the
things that I am handing in my prelaunch. That's the big promise of my prelaunch and
why they should really get on board. The mechanics of these JV Launches is basically
your partners are going to be mailing into your Squeeze Page and you want them to mail
each piece of Prelaunch Content. If we draw out your sequence again, you have your PLC
one, your PLC two, your PLC three and then your Sales Video, right?
We’re going to put a square around that. Then your sequence, you know this
already. The first piece is prelaunch, the second piece and third piece and then the Sales
Video. Here is your joint venture partner. Let’s just pretend you’ve got five of them but
I’m going to just draw one. What you want them to do is you want to mail into that first
piece but you don’t want them to stop there. You also want them to mail the second piece
of Prelaunch Content.
Some of the people on their list will not click on that link or they will not opt in,
so you want them to mail for your PLC one and PLC two. Then you want them to mail for
your Prelaunch Content number three. Maybe you might even be able to get them to mail
more than once for some of these videos. You never know. It is possible. I certainly would
be able to do that.
Because not everyone is going to click through and join, you want
them to mail on your Open Cart. When you Open Cart, we are going to put OC,
Open Cart and then when you close cart, you want them to mail when you are closing
your cart and hopefully you get them to mail in between on something else that is
happening in the middle of your Open Cart.
In fact, I like to get people to mail three times on my closing day. I said eight to 10
times, if they are mailing three times here and one time here and one time on the Open
Cart and then three times here, that’s eight times right there. That’s how they get the
most money. That’s how they make the most sales. That’s how they make the most
commissions. That’s the overall how it all goes and you can see of course they are not just
mailing into your Prelaunch Content, they are mailing into your Squeeze Page. They are
actually going into your Squeeze Page and then that is going into your content.
Here, they are mailing into your Squeeze Page and that’s going into your content.
Here, they are mailing into your Squeeze Page.
Each time they are mailing to your Squeeze Page and you are building your list.

5
© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Of course, your software is tracking them. Your software is setting a cookie in their
browser and you might even be tracking them by email but your software tracks them, all
kinds of different software. I used Synergyx. I’ve used Office Autopilot. Lots of people use
1ShoppingCart. Lots of people use InfusionSoft. Software comes and goes.
Actually the stuff I use I have been using for a long time but it comes and goes.
There is no best software. There is no perfect software. Those are just some of
the solutions out there now but whatever software you use, it’s basically tracking people
all the way through so when you make the sale, you are able to pay the joint venture
partner that sent them to you.
One of the things is Joint Venture Launches are inherently messier than your
Internal Launches because this is your ideal partner, right? Okay, that’s the ideal partner
right there. Then you are always going to have here is another partner for you. They are
not even part of the launch but then they are watching the market. They are watching
other people mail. They see what is happening and they notice you with your first piece
of Prelaunch Content and they start to get excited about your second piece and they get
ahold of you and they say, “Hey, I want to promote for you.” You are like, “Okay, great.”
You are four days into your prelaunch already and you are about to release PLC three.
Now, they might just come on board and mail your third piece and mail your
Sales Video.
Are you going to not let them do that? No, you are going to let them do that but
the thing is, they are going to send their people into the third piece of Prelaunch Content
or they might elect to mail people into your first piece but now they are coming in later.
It’s sort of a catch up. That’s what I mean when I say that it is inherently messier.
If you are doing an Internal Launch, you mail your list for each one of these. You might
be mailing your list more than one time for each one of those but with a Joint Venture
Launch, you can’t assume that your partners will mail for each piece, so inherently
messier. Your number one job when you are in a JV Launch is making money for your
partners.
If you go back to that first video where I was talking about Joint Ventures, I
mention that. You don’t want to practice on your Joint Venture partners. That’s why you
want to do the Internal Launch first. You want to make money for your partners. Don’t
screw this up. Don’t test out an offer on them. Don’t test out a Sales Video on them. Take
care of them. Treat their list like gold. Think about how important your list is to you. I
want you to treat their list even more carefully than you treat your list.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

6
© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
This is a leverage situation. If you have all these different JV’s, you’ve got a whole
bunch of JV’s, you’ve got five of them and collectively they might have whatever. They’ve
got 100,000 people or 200,00 people on their list, you have to treat those lists like gold.
You have to put out great Prelaunch Content and you’ve got to make sure that your
launch converts. Don’t mess this up because if they mail for you and you don’t convert
for them and you don’t make them money, they are not going to mail for you the next
time around. The word gets around.
In any market, all these partners, they are all talking to each other. When they are
talking to each other and your launch doesn’t convert, they are not going to mail for you
again going down the road. Take care of your partners and treat their list like gold. Just
because it is not your list doesn’t mean you can abuse it. You’ve got to give them a great
prelaunch. You’ve got to give them a great Sales Video and make sure you convert. That’s
why I say you don’t want to start out with a Joint Venture Launch. Every now and then I
do see someone that is their first launch in the JV Launch and it works out but it is not
ideal. There’s always a few exceptions to the rules, a few superstars and it will work for
them but for the most part, you want to start off with an Internal Launch first.
Another thing is just putting the whole process together is a lot of work, putting
together an Internal Launch is plenty of work but the thing is a Joint Venture Launch is
literally twice as much work as a regular. Your Internal Launch is right here, okay? Boom
and then it goes right here. Here is your Internal Launch. This is putting together your
Prelaunch Content and your Sales Video. That’s a lot of work. Let’s just call that work X.
There’s X amount of work. Managing this piece is 2-X. There is as much work right here
managing joint venture partners as there is putting together the prelaunch. That’s
another reason why you want to do the Internal Launch first. You’ve got to get it right.
You have to get this piece right and you don’t want to come out with an offer that doesn’t
convert for people.
Then there are lots and lots of small, little decisions in a JV Launch, little tiny
things like how you set the cookies in, how you track it and how you follow up. In each
one of those decisions, you can either favor your affiliate or favor your pocketbook. I’m
not going to claim I’m perfect but I know within my team, my organization, we make
those decisions almost every time for the affiliate. When you do that and treat your
affiliates well and make them a lot of money, then they are going to come back and
promote for you.
That’s why we do so well going forward. We just keep on doing one great JV
Launch after another because we really take care of our partners. We really sweat it. We
just make sure we follow up for those people. After the launch, we keep on promoting
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

7
© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
those people and keep on paying affiliates. We always pay on time. Ever since 2005, we
have paid on time. We have paid on time every single month. We track like bloodhounds.
We go to great lengths to try to make sure we track every sale to an affiliate. That’s how
you win in the long run.
One time I saw a launch where the day before their launch, they sent people to a
final video and when you landed on the page, right on the top of the page was a big red
thing that said, “Join our affiliate program.” I’m mailing on this and all of a sudden I’m
mailing and the first thing people see big and red on the top of the page is, “Join our
affiliate program.” All the people on my list that I’m sending there, they end up joining
the affiliate program and then the next day right when they open up, an hour before they
open up, they sent an email out to their affiliates that said, “By they way, you are allowed
to buy through your affiliate link.”
Essentially that meant people could buy and get paid an affiliate commission on
their own purchase, so they are able to get, I don’t know, 50% commission, they were
able to get half off. They not only, my visitors they not only offered to joint their affiliate
program, but then the next day they said, “Buy from your affiliate link and get half off.”
All those people bought through their own link, got half off and they didn’t buy through
my link. That’s a way to screw over your partners, screw over your affiliates.
If you think about it really, you’ve got all different ways to screw over your
affiliates and the more that you do that, it’s just a one-time deal. You are not going to do
well going forward if you screw over your affiliates. You’ve got to take care of your
affiliates. Your number one job in a JV Launch is taking care of your partners and your
affiliates. In the next video, I’m going to walk you through how I put together my
sequence for one of my launches to get my partners all excited to mail and keep on
mailing over and over.
